patch.value: Finish PR #15: agent-workflow preset + unified presets flags (merge-conflict resolve, bot-review fixes, functional verify)
Merge conflict resolved faithfully; Greptile/cubic/gemini findings addressed; functional verification passes; changelog check passes

value.author: unknown
value.text:
## PR #15 finishing record (2026-07-10)

**Branch:** feat/agent-enhancement-pass → main. PR was CONFLICTING.

### Merge resolution (faithful)
- Conflicted files: manifest.json, package.json (only version + description; main bumped to 2026.7.7, PR added agent-workflow = 7th preset).
- Resolved: kept mainline version 2026.7.7, kept PR feature (agent-workflow, 7 presets). Source files merged cleanly (main only bumped version).

### Bot findings addressed
1. Greptile P1 / cubic P2(conf9) / gemini — missing empty-name guard on `presets --custom`: added explicit `name.trim().length === 0` guard mirroring `presets export` (defense-in-depth; whitespace is also caught earlier by readStringOption's trim + the requires-a-flag guard, so no invalid preset can ever be produced).
2. cubic P1(conf10) — version regression 2026.6.10→ fixed by merge (now 2026.7.7).
3. cubic P2(conf10) + P3(conf10) + Greptile — catalog.summary/tags stale ("All 5", 5 tags): synced to 7 presets; tags now include kanban, agent-workflow, agent-setup.
4. cubic P2(conf6) — **REAL functional bug, verified**: AgentRun custom option key `status` collided with pm's built-in `status` field; templates set `status:"queued"` which pm rejects ("Invalid status value queued. Allowed: draft, open, in_progress, blocked, closed, canceled"). Renamed the custom option to `agentStatus` (distinct from built-in status; mirrors kanban's non-colliding `column` option). Templates now set `agentStatus`. Verified: `pm create --template agent-task` now succeeds; `--type-option agentStatus=nonsense` gives a clean CommandError with allowed-values hint; valid values accepted.
5. Greptile nit — test "non-kanban presets register no custom item types" name now inaccurate (agent-workflow also registers AgentRun): renamed to "software-sprint registers no custom item types".

### Functional verification (throwaway workspace /tmp/fx-pm-presets, pm install local build)
- Load-time safety: `timeout 20 pm --help` → exit 0 (no fork-bomb/hang).
- `pm agent-setup` applies preset + writes 3 templates.
- `pm create --template agent-task|prompt-experiment|eval-run` → all 3 create AgentRun items (was BROKEN before the agentStatus fix).
- `pm presets --list` → 7 presets; `--diff agent-workflow` → inSync true; `--custom my-config` → exports JSON; `--custom "   "` / no flag / too many flags → clean USAGE errors exit 2.
- Defaults unchanged: diffed `pm presets list` output against origin/main build — existing 6 presets byte-identical; only addition is the agent-workflow row + count 6→7.
- Existing `presets list/show/export` subcommands unchanged.

### Tests / build / changelog
- `npm run build` clean; `npm test` → 44/44 pass (0 fail).
- `npm run changelog:full` + `npm run changelog:check` → pass ("Changelog is up to date").

### Not verified
- Could not run Sourcery/CodeRabbit reviews (rate-limited at review time).
- Custom type-option values (agentStatus/mode/model) are not auto-applied from templates (only built-in fields are) — this is pm-cli's template behavior, identical for kanban's `column`; custom values set via `--type-option` work correctly. Not a PR defect.

value.author: pi-agent
